description.p: EasyKiConverter is a modern C++ desktop tool based on Qt 6 and MVVM architecture, designed for electronic engineers to efficiently convert LCSC and EasyEDA component data to KiCad library files.
EasyKiConverter 是一个基于 Qt 6 和 MVVM 架构的现代化 C++ 桌面工具， 专为电子工程师设计，旨在高效地将嘉立创（LCSC）和 EasyEDA 的元件数据转换为 KiCad 库文件。

ul.li: Full pipeline conversion: symbols (.kicad_sym), footprints (.kicad_mod), and 3D models (STEP/WRL)
Split symbol support
Efficient batch processing with multi-threading and BOM file import
Modern Qt Quick UI with dark/light theme support
Automatic LCSC component preview images and datasheet extraction
全流程转换：符号（.kicad_sym）、封装（.kicad_mod）和 3D 模型（STEP/WRL）
分体式符号支持
高效批量处理，支持多线程和 BOM 文件导入
基于 Qt Quick 的现代化 UI，支持深色/浅色主题
自动获取 LCSC 元件预览图和数据手册

screenshot.caption: Main application window with component conversion interface
主应用窗口 - 元件转换界面

description.p: Responsive UI redesign, export stability improvements, and cache write-back protection.
响应式 UI 重构、导出稳定性提升及缓存写入保护机制。

ul.li: Add responsive sidebar layout with export control components for improved main window UX
添加响应式侧边栏布局及导出控制组件，优化主窗口交互体验
Add cache write-back protection mechanism to prevent stale data from overwriting fresh entries
添加缓存写入保护机制，防止过期数据覆盖新条目
Introduce TempFileManager for safe temporary file management with backup and commit semantics
引入 TempFileManager 进行安全的临时文件管理，支持备份和提交语义
Add hover scale delay timer for card components
为卡片组件添加悬停缩放延迟定时器功能
Add exit animation effects and optimize button interaction experience
添加退出动画效果并优化按钮交互体验
Add zlib dependency support for network client tests
为网络客户端测试添加 zlib 依赖支持
Fix export cancellation crash and redesign preview image hover UI
修复导出取消崩溃问题并重新设计预览图悬停 UI
Fix Windows deployment ICU shim DLL issues and add verification steps
修复 Windows 部署中 ICU shim DLL 问题并添加验证步骤
Fix 3D model offset alignment and add CLI datasheet export support
修复 3D 模型偏移对齐问题并新增 CLI 数据手册导出支持
Unify interaction delay configuration across UI components
统一 UI 组件的交互延迟配置
Optimize slider dialog base component animation effects
优化滑块对话框基础组件的动画效果
Responsive layout optimization and UI stability fixes
响应式布局优化与 UI 稳定性修复

description.p: Security hardening and test coverage improvements.
安全加固与测试覆盖提升。

ul.li: Security hardening: URL whitelist, path traversal protection, response size limits
安全加固：URL 白名单、路径穿越防护、响应大小限制
Improve temporary file manager rename reliability in export pipeline
增强导出流水线中临时文件管理器的重命名可靠性
Expand unit test coverage for export pipeline, 3D models, network layer, and ViewModels
补充导出流水线、3D 模型、网络层和 ViewModel 的单元测试覆盖
Fix Windows build script path issues
修复 Windows 构建脚本中的路径问题

description.p: Bug fixes for export cancellation and macOS packaging improvements.
修复导出取消问题并改进 macOS 打包流程。

ul.li: Fix export stage state management issues when cancellation is triggered
修复导出阶段在取消时的状态管理问题
Add timeout configuration for macOS packaging workflow and optimize release asset upload
为 macOS 打包工作流添加超时配置并优化发布资产上传
